query:
SELECT 
  jobDate,
  SUM(totalCount) as total,
  SUM(sentCount) as sent,
  SUM(positiveCount) as positive,
  SUM(negativeCount) as negative,
  SUM(reviewConfirmedCount) as confirmed
FROM completed_job_batches
GROUP BY jobDate
ORDER BY jobDate DESC
LIMIT 20;

  SUM(negativeCount) as negative,
